name: Studio Force II Plus 12

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: B86FF941-B52A-11F0-B388-42010A37C006

comment: Studio Force II Plus 12 uses a homogenized LED source capable of delivering variable color temperature, plus/minus green shift control, and the ability to produce deep saturated colors. It is specifically designed for TV Broadcast and film applications but also performs particularly well in other situations demanding high quality tuneable white light such as touring key lights, exhibitions, corporate events, and theatre lighting.

capabilities.comment: Fixed Fan Speed = Full  Regulated Light Output - Speed
RGBW White Control Works As Normal - Custom
RGBW AutoWhite Control Act As Normal - Custom
DMX Lost Default Fixture to Stay At The State - Custom
DMX Lost Default Fixture Goes Back - Custom
DMX Lost Default Fixture To Save Look - Custom

gwSpecs.description: Studio Force II Plus 12 uses a homogenized LED source capable of delivering variable color temperature, plus/minus green shift control, and the ability to produce deep saturated colors. It is specifically designed for TV Broadcast and film applications but also performs particularly well in other situations demanding high quality tuneable white light such as touring key lights, exhibitions, corporate events, and theatre lighting.
